title: SIAC ERP
description: Enterprise ERP with a modular architecture to manage a company's administrative and operational processes from a single platform. Development of new modules, APIs, security, reports, and SQL Server query optimization.

title: SIAC Condominios
description: Platform for comprehensive condominium management: co-owner administration, payments and dues, delinquency tracking, common area reservations, QR-code visitor control, PDF reports, and an admin panel. Hybrid architecture with Laravel, Livewire, MySQL, and SQL Server.

title: Sistema Portfolio
description: Internal platform for managing the company's projects, clients, developers, and technologies, with full CRUD, image management, and an admin panel.

title: Sistema de Liquidación
description: Inventory clearance system with a catalog organized by brands and families, stock control, discounts, quotes, and a shopping cart. Decoupled frontend consuming a REST API, with role management and an admin panel.

title: MediaStock
description: Platform for cataloging and managing multimedia content, with resource organization and a focus on user experience. Frontend and backend development, plus performance optimization.

title: CapitalLingo
description: WordPress site specialized in finance and iGaming content, with theme and plugin customization, integrations, and performance optimization.

title: Flores y Detalles
description: Online store with a product catalog, shopping cart, order management, and contact forms.

title: PBT Feria
description: Institutional landing page developed for a company trade fair, focused on optimization and publishing.
